title: Optical transmission system and method for core selection in multi-core fibers
abstract: Embodiments of the invention provide an optical transmission system (100) comprising an optical transmitter (11) configured to transmit data over an optical fiber transmission channel (13) comprising a multi-core fiber, said data being carried by one or more optical signals propagating along the multi-core fiber according to a plurality of cores, each core among said plurality of cores being associated with one or more core parameters, wherein the optical transmission system (100) comprises a core selection device (17) configured to select a set of transmit cores among said plurality of cores according to a transmit core selection criterion, said transmit core selection criterion being related to said one or more core parameters, the optical transmitter (11) being configured to transmit the data over said set of transmit cores.
claims: Claims 1 . An optical transmission system (100) comprising an optical transmitter (1 1 ) configured to transmit data over an optical fiber transmission channel (13) comprising a multi-core fiber, said data being carried by one or more optical signals propagating along the multi-core fiber according to a plurality of cores, each core among said plurality of cores being associated with one or more core parameters, wherein the optical transmission system (100) comprises a core selection device (17) configured to select a set of transmit cores comprising at least one transmit core among said plurality of cores according to a transmit core selection criterion, said transmit core selection criterion being related to said one or more core parameters, the optical transmitter (1 1 ) being configured to transmit the data over said set of transmit cores. 2. The optical transmission system (100) of claim 1 , wherein each core parameter is chosen in a group comprising a core type, a core loss value, an average received energy, a number of neighbor cores. 3. The optical transmission system (100) of claims 1 and 2, wherein the core selection device (17) is configured to apply a transmit core selection criterion consisting in selecting a number of cores which have the highest average received energy. 4. The optical transmission system (100) of any preceding claim 1 and 2, wherein the multi core fiber is homogeneous and the core types associated with each of said plurality of cores are substantially identical, the core selection device (17) being configured to apply a transmit core selection criterion consisting in selecting a number of cores which are associated with the lowest number of neighbor cores. 5. The optical transmission system (100) of any preceding claim 1 and 2, wherein said multi core fiber is homogeneous and comprises an even number of cores, the core selection device (17) being configured to group said plurality of cores into pairs of cores, each pair of cores comprising two neighbor cores, the core selection device (17) being configured to apply a transmit core selection criterion consisting in selecting a core among each pair of cores. 6. The optical transmission system (100) of any preceding claim 1 and 2, wherein said multi core fiber is heterogeneous, the core selection device (17) being configured to apply a transmit core selection criterion consisting in selecting a number of cores which are associated with a predefined core type. 7. The optical transmission system (100) of any preceding claim 1 and 2, wherein said multi core fiber is heterogeneous, the core selection device (17) being configured to apply a transmit core selection criterion consisting in selecting a number of the cores which are associated with the highest core loss values. 8. The optical transmission system (100) of claim 2, wherein said multi-core fiber is associated with fiber parameters and misalignment loss values, the core selection device (17) being configured to determine each core loss value associated with each core of the multi-core fiber depending on said fiber parameters and misalignment loss values. 9. The optical transmission system (100) of claim 8, wherein said fiber parameters comprise a fiber length, a number of cores at least equal to two, crosstalk coefficients, and coupling coefficients, each crosstalk coefficient representing a crosstalk between two cores in said multi-core fiber, each coupling coefficient representing a coupling between two cores in said multi-core fiber. 10. The optical transmission system (100) of claim 8, wherein said misalignments loss values represent a misalignment of the multi-core fiber chosen in a group comprising a longitudinal misalignment, a transverse alignment, and an angular alignment. 1 1. The optical transmission system (100) of claim 8, wherein the core selection device (17) is configured to determine each core loss value associated with each core of the multi-core fiber as a random variable of a lognormal distribution defined by a mean value and a variance value, said mean value and variance value being dependent on the fiber parameters and the misalignments loss values. 12. The optical transmission system (100) of claim 1 1 , wherein the mean value of each core loss value associated with each core of the multi-core fiber is a product between a first value and a second value, the first value corresponding to the mean of a lognormal random variable representing a total misalignment loss associated with each core, the second value corresponding to a total crosstalk coefficient associated with each core, the total crosstalk coefficient associated with a given core being determined from the crosstalk coefficients representing the crosstalk between said given core and the cores of the multi-core fiber different from said given core, the variance value of each core loss value associated with each core of the multi-core fiber being the product between the square of the total crosstalk coefficient associated with said each core and a third value corresponding to the variance of said lognormal random variable representing the total misalignment loss associated with said each core. 13. The optical transmission system (100) of claim 1 , wherein the optical transmission system (100) further comprises an optical receiver (15) configured to receive and decode the optical signals carrying data transmitted over said set of selected transmit cores, the core selection device (17) being further configured to determine a set of receive cores among said plurality of cores according to a receive core selection criterion, said optical receiver (15) being configured to receive and decode said optical signals using said set of receive cores. 14. The optical transmission system (100) of claim 1 , wherein the core selection device (17) is configured select a set of transmit cores and/or a set of receive cores adaptively or periodically taking into account any replacement of optical components of the optical transmission system (100). 15. A method for core selection in an optical transmission system (100) in which data is transmitted over an optical fiber transmission channel (13) comprising a multi-core fiber, said data being carried by one or more optical signals propagating along the multi-core fiber according to a plurality of cores, each core among said plurality of cores being associated with one or more core parameters, wherein the method comprises selecting a set of transmit cores comprising at least one transmit core among said plurality of cores according to a transmit core selection criterion, said transmit core selection criterion being related to said one or more core parameters, the method comprising transmitting the data over said set of transmit cores.
